nasb.text: When the sound of the trumpet grew louder and louder, Moses spoke and God answered him with thunder.

esv.text: And as the sound of the trumpet grew louder and louder, Moses spoke, and God answered him in thunder.

cnv.text: 角聲越來越大，大到極點的時候，摩西就說話，　神用雷聲回答摩西。

ccb.text: 号角声越来越嘹亮。摩西说话，上帝就回应他，声音好像雷鸣。
